title: Error parsing an index into an unpacked array with no specified packed dimension
body:
---


Author Name: **Joe Eiler**
Original Redmine Issue: 601 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2013-01-09
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

Just upgraded from 4.832 and am seeing a new error. The problem still exists on HEAD. There are a couple of easy workarounds, as can be seen in the code example below. 

%Error: Internal Error: t/t_joe.v:11: ../V3Width.cpp:1962: Under node ARRAYSEL has no expected width?? Missing Visitor func?

```
module Test (
    input             clk,
    input             in [3:0], // no worky
// input      [0:0]  in [3:0], // worky
// input      [3:0]  in,       // worky
    input      [1:0]  sel,
    output reg        out
    );

    always @(posedge clk) begin
       out <= in[sel]?in[sel]:out;
    end
endmodule

```
